query:
SELECT 
  u.username,
  u.name AS full_name,
  u.email,
  u.systemRole AS role,
  u.jobTitle,
  tc.name AS company_name,
  tc.subscription_tier
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tenant_companies tc ON u.tenantCompanyId = tc.id
WHERE u.username IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY FIELD(u.systemRole, 'developer', 'realm_owner', 'super_admin', 'company_admin', 'manager', 'user'), tc.name, u.username;
